name: 天禄 G2 助手
description: 视觉·语音·交易三位一体智能眼镜助手

permissions.name: camera
permissions.desc: Use the phone camera to capture images for visual assistance.

permissions.name: album
permissions.desc: Use image picker fallback when camera stream is unavailable.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Capture audio from G2 glasses microphone for Tianlu voice commands.

permissions.name: phone-microphone
permissions.desc: Use phone or Bluetooth headset microphone only as an optional fallback for diagnostics and voice commands.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Connect to the G2 Bridge backend for vision, voice, ASR, TTS and OpenCLAW.
